name: mouse_minor_satellite
description: Mouse minor satellite (MiSat): ~120 bp AT-rich monomer arranged in large tandem arrays at the centromere core of all autosomes and the X. Forms the kinetochore-binding platform and binds CENP-A/CENP-B. Distinct from the major satellite which flanks it. Arrays span 200-600 kb per centromere. CENP-B box motif (17 bp) present in most monomers.
